title: G4: State causal identification conditions for the indirect effect a*b

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body: Give the conditions under which a*b admits a causal mediation interpretation (sequential ignorability; Imai-Keele-Tingley 2010 / Pearl): temporal precedence X->M->Y; no unmeasured X-Y, M-Y, and X-M confounding; no X-induced M-Y confounder; correct functional form (no unmodeled X*M interaction). Identify which research design (experimental manipulation of efficacy, or lagged longitudinal with controls) makes these assumptions plausible. These are the 'conditions under which the mediation holds' the problem demands.
